name: Shinichi Tamaki
description: Class: 2-H Affiliation: Witch Ability: Plunder    ~!Shinichi is able to take away, or "steal", witches powers. He's ability is similar to Yamada's because he can also use the powers that of other witches but instead takes the power away from the witches that he kisses. If he kisses a witch but currently holds another witch's power, the previous one is cancelled and he will only be able to use the new one until he kisses another witch.  His current witch power that he stole makes him invisible after he kisses someone. He calls himself "the invisible man". !~
